title: Mock Exam A
description: A 22-task RHCSA9 mock exam covering persistent networking, repositories, users, services, storage, NFS, SSH, and rootless containers across client and server.

tasks: On client, recover root access from the console and set the root password to cinder9.

On client, configure persistent IPv4 networking.

IP address: 192.168.122.40/24
Gateway: 192.168.122.1
DNS: 192.168.122.3
Hostname: client-a.exam9.lab
On client, configure enabled BaseOS and AppStream repositories from http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and http://server/repo/AppStream/ with GPG checks disabled.
On client, install tree from the configured repositories and remove dos2unix if it is installed.
On client, create group opsa9. Create users anaa9, deva9, and audita9; audita9 must use /sbin/nologin. Set each password to cinder9 and add anaa9 and deva9 to opsa9.
On client, set maximum password age 60 days and warning period 7 days for anaa9. Allow members of opsa9 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On client, create /srv/opsa9 owned by root:opsa9 with permissions 2770 and a default ACL granting opsa9 full access.
On client, create executable script /usr/local/bin/report-a9 that writes the active state of sshd, chronyd, and firewalld to /root/report-a9.txt.
On client, create a 512 MiB swap file at /swapa9, activate it immediately, and make it persistent.
On client, create volume group vga9 on /dev/sdb, create logical volume dataa9 with size 320 MiB, format it as XFS, and mount it persistently at /mnt/dataa9.
On client, create user poda9, enable lingering for that user, and run a rootless container named weba9 from localhost/rhcsa-httpd-base:latest.

On server, configure persistent IPv4 networking.

IP address: 192.168.122.3/24
Gateway: 192.168.122.1
DNS: 192.168.122.3
Hostname: server-a.exam9.lab
On server, configure enabled BaseOS and AppStream repositories from http://server/repo/BaseOS/ and http://server/repo/AppStream/ with GPG checks disabled.
On server, create group srva9, create user svca9 with password cinder9, add svca9 to srva9, and allow srva9 to run /usr/bin/systemctl with sudo without a password.
On server, publish /var/www/html/exam-a.html containing RHCSA9-A, configure httpd to listen on TCP port 8300, label the port for httpd, and open it permanently in firewalld.
On server, enable persistent systemd journal storage and restart systemd-journald.
On server, schedule a root cron job that runs every 5 minutes and appends server-a to /var/log/audita9.log.
On server, set the default boot target to multi-user.target and create /srv/server-a9 owned by root:srva9 with permissions 2770.
On server, export /exports/rhcsa9-a to 192.168.122.0/24. On client, mount server:/exports/rhcsa9-a persistently at /mnt/rhcsa9-a.
On server, create user copya9 with password cinder9. On client, configure key-based SSH login for root to copya9@server.
On client, create /root/exam-a-copy.txt containing RHCSA9-A and copy it to server:/home/copya9/exam-a-copy.txt.
On server, enable chronyd for the lab network. On client, configure chronyd to use server as its only time source.
solution_commands: # At the boot menu, edit the selected kernel entry.
# Append rw init=/bin/bash to the linux line and boot with Ctrl+x.
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.40/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
for service in sshd chronyd firewalld; do
nmcli connection modify "System eth1" ipv4.addresses 192.168.122.3/24 ipv4.gateway 192.168.122.1 ipv4.dns 192.168.122.3 ipv4.method manual connection.autoconnect yes
checks: echo cinder9 | su - root -c 'whoami' 2>/dev/null | grep -qx root

hostnamectl --static | grep -qx client-a.exam9.lab && CONN="System eth1"; nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.40/24 && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.1 && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fq 192.168.122.3

test -f /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '^baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/?$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '^baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/?$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && [ "$(grep -Ec '^enabled=1$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ] && [ "$(grep -Ec '^gpgcheck=0$' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ]
rpm -q tree >/dev/null

getent group opsa9 >/dev/null && id -nG anaa9 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsa9 && id -nG deva9 | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -qx opsa9 && getent passwd audita9 | awk -F: '$7 == "/sbin/nologin" {found=1} END {exit !found}'

chage -l anaa9 | grep -Eq 'Maximum.*60' && chage -l anaa9 | grep -Eq 'warning.*7' && grep -Eq '^%opsa9[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$' /etc/sudoers.d/opsa9-systemctl
stat -c '%U:%G:%a' /srv/opsa9 | grep -qx root:opsa9:2770 && getfacl -p /srv/opsa9 | grep -Eq '^default:group:opsa9:rwx$'
test -x /usr/local/bin/report-a9 && /usr/local/bin/report-a9 >/dev/null && test -s /root/report-a9.txt
swapon --show=NAME --noheadings | grep -qx '/swapa9' && awk '$1 == "/swapa9" && $2 == "swap" && $3 == "swap" {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
lvs /dev/vga9/dataa9 >/dev/null 2>&1 && findmnt -no TARGET /mnt/dataa9 | grep -qx /mnt/dataa9 && awk '$2 == "/mnt/dataa9" && $3 == "xfs" {found=1} END {exit !found}' /etc/fstab
runuser -l poda9 -c 'podman ps --format {{.Names}}' | grep -qx weba9 && loginctl show-user poda9 | grep -Eq '^Linger=yes$'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; hostnamectl --static | grep -qx server-a.exam9.lab && CONN="System eth1"; nmcli -g ipv4.addresses connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.3/24 && nmcli -g ipv4.gateway connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fqx 192.168.122.1 && nmcli -g ipv4.dns connection show "$CONN" | grep -Fq 192.168.122.3'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -f /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '"'"'^baseurl=http://server/repo/BaseOS/?$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && grep -Eq '"'"'^baseurl=http://server/repo/AppStream/?$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo && [ "$(grep -Ec '"'"'^enabled=1$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ] && [ "$(grep -Ec '"'"'^gpgcheck=0$'"'"' /etc/yum.repos.d/rhcsa9-exam.repo)" -ge 2 ]'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; getent group srva9 >/dev/null && id -nG svca9 | tr '"'"' '"'"' '"'"'\n'"'"' | grep -qx srva9 && grep -Eq '"'"'^%srva9[[:space:]]+ALL=\(ALL\)[[:space:]]+NOPASSWD:[[:space:]]*/usr/bin/systemctl$'"'"' /etc/sudoers.d/srva9-systemctl'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq RHCSA9-A /var/www/html/exam-a.html && grep -Eq '"'"'^Listen[[:space:]]+8300$'"'"' /etc/httpd/conf.d/exam-a.conf && semanage port -l | awk '"'"'$1 == "http_port_t" && $2 == "tcp" && $0 ~ /(^|[ ,])8300([, ]|$)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-port=8300/tcp && systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; files=""; test -d /var/log/journal && systemctl is-active systemd-journald | grep -qx active && files=$(find /etc/systemd -maxdepth 2 \( -path /etc/systemd/journald.conf -o -path '"'"'/etc/systemd/journald.conf.d/*.conf'"'"' \) -type f 2>/dev/null); test -n "$files" && awk '"'"'FNR == 1 {in_journal=0} /^[[:space:]]*\[Journal\][[:space:]]*($|#)/ {in_journal=1; next} /^[[:space:]]*\[/ {in_journal=0} in_journal && /^[[:space:]]*Storage[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*persistent[[:space:]]*($|#)/ {found=1} END {exit !found}'"'"' $files'

ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; test -x /usr/local/sbin/audita9.sh && grep -Fxq '"'"'*/5 * * * * root /usr/local/sbin/audita9.sh'"'"' /etc/cron.d/audita9 && grep -Fxq '"'"'echo server-a >> /var/log/audita9.log'"'"' /usr/local/sbin/audita9.sh && systemctl is-enabled crond | grep -qx enabled'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl get-default | grep -qx multi-user.target && stat -c '"'"'%U:%G:%a'"'"' /srv/server-a9 | grep -qx root:srva9:2770'

findmnt -no SOURCE,TARGET /mnt/rhcsa9-a | grep -qx 'server:/exports/rhcsa9-a /mnt/rhcsa9-a' && grep -Eq '^server:/exports/rhcsa9-a[[:space:]]+/mnt/rhcsa9-a[[:space:]]+nfs([[:space:]]|$)' /etc/fstab && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Eq "^/exports/rhcsa9-a[[:space:]]+192\\.168\\.122\\.0/24" /etc/exports.d/rhcsa9-a.exports && systemctl is-active nfs-server | grep -qx active'
runuser -l root -c 'ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o NumberOfPasswordPrompts=0 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null copya9@server true'
ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; grep -Fxq RHCSA9-A /home/copya9/exam-a-copy.txt'

grep -Eq '^server[[:space:]]+server[[:space:]]+iburst$' /etc/chrony.conf && systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && ssh server bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; systemctl is-enabled chronyd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active chronyd | grep -qx active'
